text: Here I am, entering a place that feels both clinical and enigmatic—a corridor of glass, white walls, and the faint hum of fluorescent light. My heart beats lightly, stirred by the anticipation of discovery. Turning into the R+D exhibition, I am confronted by a vibrantly designed wall, exuding the bold assurance of innovation. Yet, as I read the text about confusion and clarity, I can't help but sense a tension between knowing and not knowing, between the allure of answers and the slippery nature of perception. I feel curious, stimulated, but also humbled by how little I truly understand.
